mapper.sql:
FROM TWORK_MST_STN STN INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = STN.CTKEY
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select: /* wms-master-stationmgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectStationInfo */ SELECT CTKEY , STNDIVCD , CLASSIFDIVCD , CLASSIFTYPECD , CELLALCRITCD , STNNO , STNFACNO , STNBARCODE , WIDTH , DEPTH , HEIGHT , CBMSTARTRNG , CBMCLOSRNG , USEYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_STN WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND STNBARCODE = #{stnbarcode}

/* wms-master-stationmgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectStationCell */ SELECT CTKEY , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL01' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL01 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL02' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL02 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL03' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL03 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL04' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL04 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL05' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL05 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL06' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL06 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL07' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL07 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL08' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL08 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL09' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL09 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL10' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL10 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL11' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL11 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL12' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL12 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL13' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL13 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL14' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL14 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL15' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL15 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL16' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL16 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL17' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL17 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL18' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL18 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL19' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL19 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL20' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL20 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL21' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL21 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL22' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL22 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL23' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL23 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL24' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL24 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL25' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL25 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL26' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL26 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL27' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL27 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL28' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL28 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL29' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL29 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL30' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL30 FROM ( SELECT CTKEY , STNBARCODE , 'CELL' || CELLNO AS CELLNO , PRINO FROM TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND STNBARCODE = #{stnbarcode} ) AS pvt_src GROUP BY CTKEY

/* wms-master-stationmgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectStationPalletCell */ SELECT CTKEY , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL02' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL02 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL03' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL03 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL04' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL04 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL22' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL22 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL05' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL05 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL06' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL06 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL12' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL12 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL13' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL13 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL14' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL14 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL23' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL23 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL24' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL24 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL15' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL15 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL07' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL07 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL08' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL08 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL09' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL09 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL10' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL10 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL16' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL16 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL17' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL17 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL18' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL18 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL19' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL19 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL20' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL20 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL25' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL25 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL26' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL26 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL27' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL27 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL28' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL28 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL29' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL29 , MAX(CASE WHEN CELLNO = 'CELL30' THEN PRINO END) AS CELL30 FROM ( SELECT CTKEY , STNBARCODE , 'CELL' || CELLNO AS CELLNO , PRINO FROM TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND STNBARCODE = #{stnbarcode} ) AS pvt_src GROUP BY CTKEY

/* wms-master-stationmgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectStationWkCellUseYn */ SELECT CTKEY , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L01' THEN USEYN END) AS L01, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L02' THEN USEYN END) AS L02, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L03' THEN USEYN END) AS L03, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L04' THEN USEYN END) AS L04, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L05' THEN USEYN END) AS L05, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L06' THEN USEYN END) AS L06, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L07' THEN USEYN END) AS L07, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L08' THEN USEYN END) AS L08, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L09' THEN USEYN END) AS L09, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L10' THEN USEYN END) AS L10 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L11' THEN USEYN END) AS L11, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L12' THEN USEYN END) AS L12, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L13' THEN USEYN END) AS L13, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L14' THEN USEYN END) AS L14, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L15' THEN USEYN END) AS L15, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L16' THEN USEYN END) AS L16, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L17' THEN USEYN END) AS L17, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L18' THEN USEYN END) AS L18, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L19' THEN USEYN END) AS L19, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L20' THEN USEYN END) AS L20 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L21' THEN USEYN END) AS L21, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L22' THEN USEYN END) AS L22, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L23' THEN USEYN END) AS L23, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L24' THEN USEYN END) AS L24, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L25' THEN USEYN END) AS L25, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L26' THEN USEYN END) AS L26, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L27' THEN USEYN END) AS L27, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L28' THEN USEYN END) AS L28, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L29' THEN USEYN END) AS L29, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L30' THEN USEYN END) AS L30 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L31' THEN USEYN END) AS L31, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L32' THEN USEYN END) AS L32, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L33' THEN USEYN END) AS L33, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L34' THEN USEYN END) AS L34, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L35' THEN USEYN END) AS L35, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L36' THEN USEYN END) AS L36, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L37' THEN USEYN END) AS L37, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L38' THEN USEYN END) AS L38, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L39' THEN USEYN END) AS L39, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L40' THEN USEYN END) AS L40 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R01' THEN USEYN END) AS R01, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R02' THEN USEYN END) AS R02, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R03' THEN USEYN END) AS R03, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R04' THEN USEYN END) AS R04, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R05' THEN USEYN END) AS R05, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R06' THEN USEYN END) AS R06, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R07' THEN USEYN END) AS R07, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R08' THEN USEYN END) AS R08, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R09' THEN USEYN END) AS R09, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R10' THEN USEYN END) AS R10 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R11' THEN USEYN END) AS R11, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R12' THEN USEYN END) AS R12, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R13' THEN USEYN END) AS R13, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R14' THEN USEYN END) AS R14, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R15' THEN USEYN END) AS R15, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R16' THEN USEYN END) AS R16, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R17' THEN USEYN END) AS R17, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R18' THEN USEYN END) AS R18, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R19' THEN USEYN END) AS R19, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R20' THEN USEYN END) AS R20 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R21' THEN USEYN END) AS R21, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R22' THEN USEYN END) AS R22, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R23' THEN USEYN END) AS R23, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R24' THEN USEYN END) AS R24, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R25' THEN USEYN END) AS R25, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R26' THEN USEYN END) AS R26, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R27' THEN USEYN END) AS R27, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R28' THEN USEYN END) AS R28, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R29' THEN USEYN END) AS R29, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R30' THEN USEYN END) AS R30 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R31' THEN USEYN END) AS R31, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R32' THEN USEYN END) AS R32, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R33' THEN USEYN END) AS R33, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R34' THEN USEYN END) AS R34, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R35' THEN USEYN END) AS R35, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R36' THEN USEYN END) AS R36, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R37' THEN USEYN END) AS R37, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R38' THEN USEYN END) AS R38, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R39' THEN USEYN END) AS R39, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R40' THEN USEYN END) AS R40 FROM ( SELECT CTKEY , STNBARCODE , DIRTDIVCD || CELLNO AS KEY , USEYN FROM TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND STNBARCODE = #{stnbarcode} ) AS pvt_src GROUP BY CTKEY

/* wms-master-stationmgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectStationWkCell */ SELECT CTKEY , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L01' THEN PRINO END) AS L01, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L02' THEN PRINO END) AS L02, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L03' THEN PRINO END) AS L03, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L04' THEN PRINO END) AS L04, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L05' THEN PRINO END) AS L05, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L06' THEN PRINO END) AS L06, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L07' THEN PRINO END) AS L07, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L08' THEN PRINO END) AS L08, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L09' THEN PRINO END) AS L09, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L10' THEN PRINO END) AS L10 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L11' THEN PRINO END) AS L11, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L12' THEN PRINO END) AS L12, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L13' THEN PRINO END) AS L13, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L14' THEN PRINO END) AS L14, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L15' THEN PRINO END) AS L15, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L16' THEN PRINO END) AS L16, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L17' THEN PRINO END) AS L17, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L18' THEN PRINO END) AS L18, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L19' THEN PRINO END) AS L19, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L20' THEN PRINO END) AS L20 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L21' THEN PRINO END) AS L21, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L22' THEN PRINO END) AS L22, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L23' THEN PRINO END) AS L23, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L24' THEN PRINO END) AS L24, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L25' THEN PRINO END) AS L25, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L26' THEN PRINO END) AS L26, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L27' THEN PRINO END) AS L27, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L28' THEN PRINO END) AS L28, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L29' THEN PRINO END) AS L29, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L30' THEN PRINO END) AS L30 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L31' THEN PRINO END) AS L31, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L32' THEN PRINO END) AS L32, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L33' THEN PRINO END) AS L33, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L34' THEN PRINO END) AS L34, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L35' THEN PRINO END) AS L35, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L36' THEN PRINO END) AS L36, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L37' THEN PRINO END) AS L37, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L38' THEN PRINO END) AS L38, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L39' THEN PRINO END) AS L39, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'L40' THEN PRINO END) AS L40 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R01' THEN PRINO END) AS R01, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R02' THEN PRINO END) AS R02, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R03' THEN PRINO END) AS R03, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R04' THEN PRINO END) AS R04, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R05' THEN PRINO END) AS R05, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R06' THEN PRINO END) AS R06, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R07' THEN PRINO END) AS R07, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R08' THEN PRINO END) AS R08, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R09' THEN PRINO END) AS R09, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R10' THEN PRINO END) AS R10 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R11' THEN PRINO END) AS R11, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R12' THEN PRINO END) AS R12, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R13' THEN PRINO END) AS R13, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R14' THEN PRINO END) AS R14, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R15' THEN PRINO END) AS R15, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R16' THEN PRINO END) AS R16, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R17' THEN PRINO END) AS R17, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R18' THEN PRINO END) AS R18, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R19' THEN PRINO END) AS R19, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R20' THEN PRINO END) AS R20 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R21' THEN PRINO END) AS R21, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R22' THEN PRINO END) AS R22, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R23' THEN PRINO END) AS R23, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R24' THEN PRINO END) AS R24, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R25' THEN PRINO END) AS R25, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R26' THEN PRINO END) AS R26, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R27' THEN PRINO END) AS R27, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R28' THEN PRINO END) AS R28, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R29' THEN PRINO END) AS R29, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R30' THEN PRINO END) AS R30 , MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R31' THEN PRINO END) AS R31, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R32' THEN PRINO END) AS R32, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R33' THEN PRINO END) AS R33, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R34' THEN PRINO END) AS R34, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R35' THEN PRINO END) AS R35, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R36' THEN PRINO END) AS R36, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R37' THEN PRINO END) AS R37, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R38' THEN PRINO END) AS R38, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R39' THEN PRINO END) AS R39, MAX(CASE WHEN KEY = 'R40' THEN PRINO END) AS R40 FROM ( SELECT CTKEY , STNBARCODE , DIRTDIVCD || CELLNO AS KEY , PRINO FROM TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND STNBARCODE = #{stnbarcode} ) AS pvt_src GROUP BY CTKEY

/* wms-master-stationmgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectStationWkCellGroupNo */ SELECT CTKEY , STNBARCODE , ROWNO , MAX(GRPNO) AS GRPNO , MAX(GRPNO) AS ORG_GRPNO FROM TWORK_MST_STNWKCELL WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND STNBARCODE = #{stnbarcode} GROUP BY CTKEY , STNBARCODE , ROWNO ORDER BY ROWNO
